privileged_info_summary: I discovered that this task is critically defective. Essential scripts required by the task hooks (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) and data files (scenario_manybears_t90.txt) are entirely missing from the environment. Consequently, no tax documents are ever provided for the agent to process, and the verifier perpetually fails because the required 't90_result.json' is never generated.
